result.stdout:
ZYQ CLI v1.0.0
  Test cli command which is create by ZYQ

USAGE
  zyqcli [options]
  zyqcli [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  newapi            Create a .net API with zyqAPI template 
  sayhi             This is a say hi command 

You can run `zyqcli [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
ZYQ CLI v1.0.0
  Test cli command which is create by ZYQ

USAGE
  zyqcli newapi <name> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Create a .net API with zyqAPI template

PARAMETERS
* name              API name 

OPTIONS
  -e|--EnableCORS   Whether enable CORS or not, the default is false Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
